checks.finding: Every AC-NNN cited in tasks.md Done When items (AC-001..AC-017) resolves to a real criterion in acceptance-tests.md. No dangling AC IDs.
All 11 Blockers fields are None (T-001) or comma-separated T-NNN lists. No range notation or prose. Matches precheck blockers_format_valid: true.
All REQ-001..REQ-011 appear in at least one task's Requirements field, matching traceability.md's REQ->Task table exactly.
All AC-001..AC-017 are traceable to a task via explicit Done When references (AC-013->T-009, AC-014->T-005, AC-012/AC-005->T-010, AC-017 split T-001/T-004), matching traceability.md.
All 11 tasks declare a non-empty Requirements field with at least one valid REQ-NNN.
T-007 and T-010 contain test-like title substrings but neither is exclusively test-file scope, and both reference concrete ACs (T-007: AC-006/AC-010; T-010: AC-012/AC-005). No orphaned test task.
All 11 tasks show Approval: Draft and Status: Planned; compliant for round 3.
All pairings match the risk-gate-matrix: 8x high/tdd, 2x medium/acceptance-first, 1x low/test-after.
Each AC is claimed by exactly one task except the explicitly differentiated AC-017 split (T-001 too-large/not-sdd-root; T-004 not-found), matching traceability.md.
All Blockers references resolve to existing task IDs; the 20 edges in dependency-graph.json are an exact set-equality match to the Blockers fields.
DFS over 20 edges (11 nodes) found no cycle; valid DAG consistent with the stated execution order.

T-001's four sub-parts form a single tightly-coupled foundational chokepoint (path-guard depends on root resolution and reports via the shared envelope) — mandatory non-decoupleable foundation work. No task combines unrelated feature concerns.
No forbidden vague verbs in any Done When list. Every item names a concrete AC criterion, evidence record, or named artifact path.
Every task ID (T-001..T-011) has corresponding traceability.md entries; every REQ-ID exists in requirements.md. No dangling references.
